---
title: "The Rev. Duke Yonge"
---

## The Rev. Duke Yonge

**Dates:** (13 Oct 1779-29 July 1836)

### Description

Vicar of Antony, paternal uncle of CMY

### Biography

Eldest brother of WCY, he married (14 May 1806) Cordelia Anne Colborne, who was FMY’s stepsister.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
